reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: The output document is missing a massive portion of the source content. Pages 5 through 19 of the source PDF, which contain essential instructional guides, screenshots, and practice exercises, are completely absent from the output. The conversion result includes an explicit placeholder stating that 15 sections were omitted. This is a critical failure to capture the document's information.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source PDF contains 21 slides. Slides 5 through 19 include detailed sections such as an example prompt breakdown, instructions for summarizing messages, creating usage guides, 'What can you do with Copilot', and several 'Practice' modules (Slides 15-19).
concerns.location: Between the section representing Slide 4 and the section representing Slide 20 (index 4 in the sections array).

concerns.analysis: Several hyperlinks and contact links visible in the source PDF are not captured as functional links in the JSON output. On page 2, the contact email 'Josh.Meredith@microsoft.com' is blue and underlined in the PDF but is rendered as plain text in the JSON. Similarly, on page 20, the phrase 'Copilot Lab' in the title is styled as a link in the source but is plain text in the output. The lack of link metadata for these visible identifiers constitutes a missing link defect.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 2: Josh.Meredith@microsoft.com (styled as a blue underlined hyperlink). Page 20: Copilot Lab (styled as a blue underlined hyperlink in the title).
concerns.output_quote: Page 2: "text": "Josh.Meredith@microsoft.com". Page 20: "text": "Find more Email prompts to try in Copilot Lab".
concerns.location: Sections for Page 2 and Page 20 (element index 11 and 142).
